title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 28 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 28 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 28 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/04/2022
DCE iron ore futures market rose by 3.53%,the main contract closed 851.5. the quotation in the morning was increased by 10 yuan/mt overyesterday, The afternoon to continue to rise. some traders quotation is still stronger.
